zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强上行结构延续
zh.content:
当前AVAX/美元呈现震荡上行结构，价格运行在6.25附近并持续高于20日均线6.13898，短线多头占据主导。盘中高点逐步抬升，但整体动能偏温和，未出现明显加速拉升。市场从前期低位修复后进入整理上行阶段，只要维持在6.20上方运行，整体趋势仍有延续上探前高的潜力。

技术指标方面，MACD数值为0.0232，位于零轴上方，说明多头动能仍在释放过程中，但缺乏信号线共振，趋势确认度中等。价格稳定站上20日均线，均线结构由压制转为支撑形态。由于RSI缺失，当前更依赖价格行为判断，整体动能偏强但尚未进入明显过热阶段。

支撑结构集中在6.19短期低点以及6.14均线区域，该区域构成关键防守带，一旦跌破可能回落至震荡中枢。上方阻力位主要在6.26前高位置，若放量突破该区域，将有望打开至6.30上方空间，但需要成交量与动能同步配合确认突破有效性。

交易策略上，短线可关注回踩6.19至6.14区间分批低吸布局，以顺势多头思路为主，并将止损控制在6.12下方以防趋势反转。若价格放量突破6.26，可考虑顺势跟进加仓。整体以回调做多为主，避免在区间中部追单，等待关键位确认更稳妥。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently in a mild recovery phase, trading just above the short-term moving average and holding a narrow consolidation range. Price action shows stabilization after prior volatility, with buyers gradually defending dips near the mid-6.10s. Momentum remains modest but tilted slightly upward, suggesting accumulation rather than strong trend expansion. Overall structure indicates a developing short-term base with cautious bullish bias.

MACD positive 0.023 suggests early bullish momentum, though without a confirmed signal line it remains a weak but constructive indication. The absence of RSI limits overbought/oversold clarity, but price holding above SMA(20) at 6.1389 supports near-term strength. The slight uptick in price indicates momentum recovery, yet conviction remains limited without broader volume confirmation or stronger indicator alignment, overall bias cautious positive.

Immediate resistance is seen near the recent high around 6.26, with a breakout potentially opening the path toward 6.30 and 6.35. On the downside, initial support sits at 6.19, followed by stronger confluence around the SMA(20) near 6.14. Price compression suggests a breakout is approaching, with volatility likely to expand once range boundaries are breached decisively. Traders should monitor volume for confirmation.

In the current environment, range-trading strategies may be more effective than directional bets, with long entries favored near support zones and partial profit-taking near resistance. A confirmed breakout above 6.26 could justify momentum long positions, while failure to hold 6.14 would weaken the bullish case. Risk management remains essential given low volatility and fragile trend structure. Position sizing should remain conservative until clearer confirmation emerges now.
